'''shapushu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:nickering|nickering]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-p-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nickering|nickering]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| shapushu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shæpishith|shæpishith]] || [[word:shæpishij|shæpishij]] || [[word:shæpishish|shæpishish]] || [[word:shæpishi|shæpishi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:shapupushuth|shapupushuth]] || [[word:shapupushuj|shapupushuj]] || [[word:shapupushush|shapupushush]] || [[word:shapupushu|shapupushu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:shapushuth|shapushuth]] || [[word:shapushuj|shapushuj]] || [[word:shapushush|shapushush]] || [[word:shapushu|shapushu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:shapufshuth|shapufshuth]] || [[word:shapufshuj|shapufshuj]] || [[word:shapufshush|shapufshush]] || [[word:shapufshuf|shapufshuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:shapushuthu|shapushuthu]] || [[word:shapushuju|shapushuju]] || [[word:shapushushu|shapushushu]] || [[word:shapushuku|shapushuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:shapushuth|shapushuth]] || [[word:shapushuj|shapushuj]] || [[word:shapushush|shapushush]] || [[word:shapushu|shapushu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:shapushuthul|shapushuthul]] || [[word:shapushujul|shapushujul]] || [[word:shapushushul|shapushushul]] || [[word:shapushukul|shapushukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:shapushuthuthu|shapushuthuthu]] || [[word:shapushujuju|shapushujuju]] || [[word:shapushushushu|shapushushushu]] || [[word:shapushuku|shapushuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:shapushuthun|shapushuthun]] || [[word:shapushujun|shapushujun]] || [[word:shapushushun|shapushushun]] || [[word:shapushukun|shapushukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:shapushuthuoro|shapushuthuoro]] || [[word:shapushujuoro|shapushujuoro]] || [[word:shapushushuoro|shapushushuoro]] || [[word:shapushukuoro|shapushukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c6f8e69}}
